summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Legal Citation Lookup site (Shotta). All major features working correctly including user registration, profile management, citation search with 5-second loading animation, results display, courses of action, payment methods, and admin dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: Calendar date selection has interaction issues - clicking on dates doesn't always work
ui_bugs.workaround: Form submission works without DOB, not blocking user flow

passed_tests: Citation search with invalid citation showing 'Citations not found'
Results page displaying 4 citations with correct totals
Courses of Action page with Criminal and Civil options
US Government website styling and branding

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with date picker)
